<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get public calendar events in FullCalendar format"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/public/calendar/{CalendarAccessToken}/fullcalendar"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns events formatted for the FullCalendar JavaScript library.

  as={"h2"}
